title: New Upgrades
description: Craft new upgraded armor pieces and tools
body:
# **New upgrades**
With this data pack, you will be able to craft new ores in order to create new powerful stuff and tools.
The new ores are Aluminium, Steel and Titanium.
All pieces of equiments are unbreakable.

# **Custom crafting Table**
In order to make those new features, you need to create the custom crafting table. To do so, oyu have to throw a gold ingot on top of a dropper

![Create the custom crafter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddc4df94b37af144c88b21e08732eb44079d94a3.png)

# **New Ores**
- ## Aluminium
To craft Aluminium, you need 3 copper ingot and 1 iron ingot

![Aluminium craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06f7d37ec5f0985f1471ca998c788101be2d43b9.png)

- ## Steel
To craft steel, you need 3 aluminium ingot and 1 gold ingot

![Steel craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5a718ae4e70e642ff3164ef47f695959738a3a0.png)

- ## Titanium
To craft titanium, you need 3 steel ingot and 1 diamond

![Titanium craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21c3fd46bde18b5b83b2a787964e111ee0b3a96c.png)

# **New Tools**
3 new tier are available to craft.
- The aluminium tools are effeciency 7.
- The aluminium tools are effeciency 8.
- The aluminium tools are effeciency 9.

The pickaxes have fortune: 3 (aluminium), 4 (steel), and 5 (titanium)
The swords have shapness 6, 7 and 8. The steel and titanium ones have a slightly better attack speed.

- ## Pickaxe
3 new pickaxes can be crafted. To do the Aluminium one, you need 3 stacks of aluminium, 1 stick and a netherite pickaxe.

![Pickaxe craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc4546280af3c6cecc490bcf061da01b1a47e07f.png)

To craft the Steel one, you have to replace the aluminium by steel and the netherite pickaxe by the aluminium one

To craft the Titanium one, you have to replace the aluminium by titanium and the netherite pickaxe by the steel one

- ## Axe
3 new axes can be crafted. To do the Aluminium one, you need 3 stacks of aluminium, 1 stick and a netherite axe.

![Axe craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/561a6ca4216d23d00f4101edb80d984c6f297f91.png)

To craft the Steel one, you have to replace the aluminium by steel and the netherite axe by the aluminium one

To craft the Titanium one, you have to replace the aluminium by titanium and the netherite axe by the steel one

- ## Shovel
3 new shovels can be crafted. To do the Aluminium one, you need 3 stacks of aluminium, 1 stick and a netherite shovel.

![Shovel craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41893b22f69526c4bcd57864e29c140b063120c1.png)

To craft the Steel one, you have to replace the aluminium by steel and the netherite shovel by the aluminium one

To craft the Titanium one, you have to replace the aluminium by titanium and the netherite shovel by the steel one

- ## Sword
3 new swords can be crafted. To do the Aluminium one, you need 3 stacks of aluminium, 1 stick and a netherite sword.

![Sword craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eda4a89bb608415f25ff8d960912e550b37f030.png)

To craft the Steel one, you have to replace the aluminium by steel and the netherite sword by the aluminium one

To craft the Titanium one, you have to replace the aluminium by titanium and the netherite sword by the steel one

# **New Armors**
3 new tier are available to craft.
- The aluminium tools are protection 5.
- The aluminium tools are protection 6.
- The aluminium tools are protection 7.

- ## Helmet
3 new helmets can be crafted. To do the Aluminium one, you need 5 stacks of aluminium and a netherite helmet.

![Helmet craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f911ac85e31d5598f7d55882485634e10116b77.png)!

To craft the Steel one, you have to replace the aluminium by steel and the netherite helmet by the aluminium one

To craft the Titanium one, you have to replace the aluminium by titanium and the netherite helmet by the steel one

- ## Chestplate
3 new chestplates can be crafted. To do the Aluminium one, you need 8 stacks of aluminium and a netherite chestplate.

![Chestplate craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e999d08baf66d6b5d186f9f5232d4d60112565.png)

To craft the Steel one, you have to replace the aluminium by steel and the netherite chestplate by the aluminium one

To craft the Titanium one, you have to replace the aluminium by titanium and the netherite chestplate by the steel one

- ## Leggings
3 new helmets can be crafted. To do the Aluminium one, you need 7 stacks of aluminium and a netherite leggings.

![Leggings craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89b6304e756f038f2dbf8a93c6f6a62f7310d10a.png)

To craft the Steel one, you have to replace the aluminium by steel and the netherite leggings by the aluminium one

To craft the Titanium one, you have to replace the aluminium by titanium and the netherite leggings by the steel one

- ## Boots
3 new boots can be crafted. To do the Aluminium one, you need 4 stacks of aluminium and a netherite boots.

![Boots craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/212f9e6d515827452e916b9d4aa3ded35612614f.png)

To craft the Steel one, you have to replace the aluminium by steel and the netherite boots by the aluminium one

To craft the Titanium one, you have to replace the aluminium by titanium and the netherite boots by the steel one

# **Special boots**
Finally you can also craft a special pair of boots called "moon boots". To do so you need 4 stacks of aluminium, a rabbit foot and netherite boots.

![Moon boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fd5ec240aaa8fd836571e08053abe5100473dd4.png)
